coreIssue: This check-in is mainly about aligning Priya's next-quarter ownership before new work lands and collides with plans she may already be forming.
openingQuestion: What are you hoping to own next quarter, and where does mentoring fit into that after this week's launch?
listenFor: whether she names a specific scope she expects to lead or keeps it broad
whether she volunteers what changed after Monday or stays only on delivery facts
if they describe mentoring with a concrete person or project versus a general interest
avoid: do not treat a quieter week after launch as evidence that something is wrong
do not pitch the billing rewrite before you understand what scope she already expects to own
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed one senior-level ownership area she wants to lead next quarter, including whether mentoring is part of that scope.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example from the Monday launch and one open next-quarter scope so you can test her ownership expectations without leading her.
